_comment: Marketing addons — pre-connection landing + post-connection state per addon. 12 addons x 2 variants = 24 captures. Connection variant clicks Add New Connection, accepts the default nickname on the jconfirm modal, then dispatches change events to walk down the cascading selects (account -> action/list -> sub-field) and toggles Conditional Logic on. Generic enough for the WPForms standard provider shape.

steps.eval: const block = document.querySelector("#wpforms-panel-providers .wpforms-builder-provider-connection"); if (block) { const selects = block.querySelectorAll("select:not([disabled])"); for (const s of selects) { if (!s.value) { const first = Array.from(s.options).find(o => o.value && !o.disabled); if (first) { s.value = first.value; s.dispatchEvent(new Event("change", {bubbles:true})); if (window.jQuery) jQuery(s).trigger("change"); break; } } } }

const block = document.querySelector("#wpforms-panel-providers .wpforms-builder-provider-connection"); if (block) { const selects = block.querySelectorAll("select:not([disabled])"); for (const s of selects) { if (!s.value) { const first = Array.from(s.options).find(o => o.value && !o.disabled); if (first) { s.value = first.value; s.dispatchEvent(new Event("change", {bubbles:true})); if (window.jQuery) jQuery(s).trigger("change"); break; } } } }

const cl = document.querySelector("#wpforms-panel-providers .wpforms-builder-provider-connection .wpforms-panel-field-conditional_logic-checkbox"); if (cl && !cl.checked) { cl.checked = true; cl.dispatchEvent(new Event("change", {bubbles:true})); if (window.jQuery) jQuery(cl).trigger("change"); }
